CustomField.label: AI Meeting Summary
CustomField.description: Structured JSON output from OA_AISummaryService. Contains: customer_needs, opportunities_identified, risks_or_concerns, action_items, follow_up_commitments, proposal_indicators, teaming_indicators, recommended_outcome, confidence, summary_paragraph. SENSITIVE: contains AI-derived business intelligence. Restrict via FLS to OA_Marketing_Automation permission set.
